description.ko: 다양한 기후와 지형에 걸쳐 자연적인 지질학적 과정으로 형성된 복잡하고 예술적인 패턴을 포착하여 지구 지각을 거시적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A macroscopic exploration of the Earth's crust, capturing the intricate and artistic patterns formed by natural geological processes across different climates and terrains.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of Earth's diverse surface textures, featuring cracked salt flats, swirling Saharan sand dunes, intricate river deltas resembling organic veins, and jagged volcanic basalt formations, top-down perspective, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, high contrast, detailed geological patterns.
